name: Nginx Successful Serve of Sensitive File
hypothesis: An HTTP 200 response to a known-sensitive path indicates the server successfully served a resource that should not be publicly accessible.
false_positives: Intentional security validation by trusted teams
Developer QA scripts targeting known sensitive file paths

tuning.allowlist_source_ips: Exclude IPs belonging to authorized security scanners or internal QA
tuning.path_list: Add or remove sensitive paths based on the application stack in use
